name: Hearth Storm
short_description: Hearth Storm is a turn-based strategy game where players attack and defend using cards. Strategically play to outwit enemies in this Solitaire-inspired game. With 20+ unique classes and dynamic card mechanics, every match offers fresh challenges and endless strategic possibilities.
detailed_description:
Hearth Storm is a turn-based strategy game where players attack and defend using cards. Strategically play to outwit enemies in this Solitaire-inspired game. With 20+ unique classes and dynamic card mechanics, every match offers fresh challenges and endless strategic possibilities.

TURN-BASED STRATEGY MEETS CARD COMBAT

At its core, Hearth Storm revolves around players attack and defend by drawing cards from their deck. Each turn presents a choice: should you play an aggressive card to deal heavy damage or a defensive card to prepare for incoming attacks?

Every move requires careful planning as you balance your strategy between offense and survival. The dynamic card mechanics ensure that each battle is a test of wit and adaptability.

With 20+ distinct classes, each boasting unique abilities and playstyles, the game invites creative strategies and experimentation. No two runs will feel the same, offering endless opportunities for discovery and replayability.

ROGUELIKE WITH DECKBUILDING

Engage in carefully crafted battles teeming with challenges and opportunities for creative play. Choose which enemies to confront as you adapt your strategy based on your hero’s unique abilities and the cards at your disposal.

Each match is a standalone challenge that pushes you to think tactically and use your resources wisely. While progress resets after each encounter, players can continuously refine their strategies and experiment with different classes to discover powerful synergies.

CRAFT CRAZY COMBOS

Hearth Storm’s unique blend of strategy, chance, and RPG mechanics delivers a dynamic and evolving gameplay experience. Whether you’re a fan of dungeon crawlers, deckbuilders, or dice games, the game offers endless ways to craft powerful combos, overcome challenges, and enjoy hours of replayable fun.

Unfold your cards, roll your dice, and conquer the dungeon in Hearth Storm!
